connectors.name: I2C Clock / SPI Data Out
connectors.description: When using I2C mode connect this pin to the 'I2C Clock' (SCL) signal of the controller. When using SPI mode this pin is used to read data from this device. Connect this pin to the 'SPI Data In' (DI/DIN/SI) pin or to a digital input pin of your controller

connectors.name: I2C Data / SPI Data In
connectors.description: When using I2C mode connect this pin to the 'I2C Data' (SDA) signal of the controller. When using SPI mode this pin is used to write data into this device. Connect this pin to the 'SPI Data Out' (DO/DOUT/SO) pin or to a digital output pin of your controller

connectors.name: 0V
connectors.description: Connect to the 0V (ground) of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: +V
connectors.description: Connect to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: SPI clock
connectors.description: When using SPI mode this pin is used to clock data in and data out of the device. Connect this pin to the 'SPI Clock' (SCK/SCLK) pin or to a digital output pin of your controller

connectors.name: AVSS - Analogue Ground
connectors.description: Connect to the 0V (ground) of the analogue power supply

connectors.name: AVDD - Analogue Supply
connectors.description: Connect to the positive rail of the analogue power supply
